pom.xml.general_idea: Include the new 'mongodriver' module in the multi-module build.

spring-boot-mongo/pom.xml.general_idea: Switch parent POM from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom project parent to centralize dependency management.
Rename artifactId to match the directory name and project identity.
Update project name to be more descriptive.
Remove explicit Java version property as it is likely managed by the new parent or defaults.
Add docker-maven-plugin version property for consistent versioning.
Add Spring Boot Actuator dependency for production-ready features.
Add Docker Maven plugin configuration within a profile to build Docker images.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Update Hamcrest assertion import to explicit static import.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.why_exists: Static imports from org.junit.Assert.assertThat are often removed in JUnit 5 migrations in favor of explicit Hamcrest imports to avoid ambiguity.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Modernize code formatting and variable declarations.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Update @Relationship annotation to use uppercase type string and add private modifier.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.why_exists: While the annotation class name is the same, the package changed (handled in imports), and this ensures compatibility with the new schema mapping conventions.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Add diamond operator to HashSet instantiation for modern Java syntax.
Consolidate getter and setter methods into single-line format for brevity.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.after:
public String getLogin() { return login; }
public void setLogin(String login) { this.login = login; }

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Modernize Cypher query syntax from legacy START/MATCH to modern MATCH pattern matching.
springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: Legacy START clause is deprecated and may be removed in future Neo4j versions; modern syntax is preferred for compatibility and performance.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Change rootId field type from primitive long to wrapper Long to support nullability.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.why_exists: Primitive long cannot hold null; if ID is not set, default 0 causes logic errors or NPEs in some contexts.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Remove unused import for UserRepository (if no longer directly referenced in a way that requires it, or just cleanup).

Remove unused import for SpringExtension (if not used, but here it IS used in @ExtendWith, so this is actually a KEEP. Let's check if SpringExtension is removed? No, it's added. So no removal intent for SpringExtension.)
Remove debug print statement and helper method.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Clean up comments and formatting in test methods.
